name: Lentil Buckwheat Loaf
recipeIngredient: dried herbs (parsley and rosemary are recommended)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop onion and carrot, sauté in a large saucepan.
2. Add all other ingredients; bring mixture to boil.
3. Simmer for 30 minutes, until liquid is absorbed.
4. Preheat oven to 200°C/400°F/Gas Mark 6.
5. Pour the mixture into a loaf or flan dish.
6. Place the dish in the preheated oven.
7. Bake for 30 minutes.
